article_title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, the First Open Model to Unify Vision, Audio, and Language in a Single Efficient Architecture

findings.message: Body cites 1 URL(s) not in article.sources (provenance break)
findings.details:
These URLs appear as Markdown links in body_markdown but are missing from article.sources, so they have no committed snapshot under sources/YYYY-MM/<slug>/ and cannot be verified through the provenance chain. Orphan URL(s):
  - https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/nemotron-3-nano-omni-multimodal-agents/

content_preview.title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, the First Open Model to Unify Vision, Audio, and Language in a Single Efficient Architecture
content_preview.summary: NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 Nano Omni combines text, image, video, and audio processing in one 30B-parameter open model that activates only 3B parameters per pass, delivering up to 9x the throughput of comparable open omni models.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

NVIDIA released Nemotron 3 Nano Omni on April 28, 2026, an open multimodal model that processes text, images, video, and audio through a single unified architecture, according to the [NVIDIA blog](https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/nemotron-3-nano-omni-multimodal-ai-agents/). The model carries 30 billion total parameters but activates only 3 billion per forward pass through a mixture-of-experts design, and NVIDIA says it delivers up to 9x higher throughput than other open omni models at ...

recommendations: Close the PR without merging. The work is discarded under the v3.9.0 workflow.
Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt

Either add the orphan URL(s) to article.sources (requires resubmission since the submission is signed and immutable), or re-attribute every orphan citation to a URL that IS in article.sources, then resubmit.
